careers.name: Software Engineer/Developer
careers.short_description: Professional role working in the field of Software Engineer/Developer to design, implement, or manage solutions.
careers.about: A Software Engineer/Developer applies industry best practices, analytical methods, and specialized tools to resolve domain-specific problems. You will collaborate in multidisciplinary teams, drive strategic objectives, and continuously update your skill set to adapt to market trends.
educational_roadmap: Class 12 with PCM / PCB background.
Clear engineering entrance exams like JEE Main, BITSAT, or state-level CETs.
Complete B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Electronics (4 years), or BCA/B.Sc. CS.
Learn key development frameworks and modern programming languages (e.g., Python, JavaScript, C++, SQL).
Build a GitHub portfolio with personal/open-source projects and complete a junior developer internship.
Obtain vendor certifications (e.g. AWS, Cisco, RedHat) and join tech firms as a junior specialist in Software Engineer/Developer.

careers.name: AI/ML Engineer
careers.short_description: Develops algorithms and mathematical models that enable computers to learn, make decisions, and act autonomously.
careers.about: AI and Machine Learning Engineers design the systems that power self-driving cars, recommend songs, or chat like humans. You will write code in Python, C++, or Julia, work with neural network architectures (transformers, CNNs), optimize training datasets, and deploy machine learning models on cloud platforms. It requires strong math, logic, and coding skills.
educational_roadmap: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) background.
Clear JEE Main, JEE Advanced, or BITSAT.
Obtain B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science, AI, or Data Science (4 years).
Learn Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and linear algebra through online portfolios.
Complete M.Tech or M.Sc. in Machine Learning or Artificial Intelligence (Optional).
careers.growth_outlook: Exceptional demand, key sector in the New Economy

careers.name: Data Scientist
careers.short_description: Analyzes complex datasets using statistics and machine learning to uncover insights and solve business problems.
careers.about: Data Scientists combine programming, mathematics, and analytical reasoning. You'll write code in Python or R, clean messy datasets, build machine learning models to predict trends, and design data visualizations to present your findings to decision-makers. It's a rapidly growing field perfect for students who love logic, data, and computers.
educational_roadmap: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) background.
Clear JEE Main, BITSAT, or ISI Admission Test.
Obtain B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science or B.Sc. in Statistics/Mathematics (3-4 years).
Complete M.Sc. in Data Science or MCA (Optional, 2 years).
Acquire junior role or internships to gain professional experience.

careers.name: Cybersecurity Analyst
careers.short_description: Protects an organization's computer networks, data, and digital systems from unauthorized access, hacks, and security threats.
careers.about: Cybersecurity Analysts act as digital security guards. You will monitor network traffic for suspicious activity, set up firewalls, conduct vulnerability assessments (ethical hacking), and respond to security breaches. As threats grow globally, companies of all sizes are investing heavily in defensive cybersecurity teams.
educational_roadmap: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) background.
Clear JEE Main, BITSAT, or CUET-UG.
Obtain B.Tech or B.Sc. in Computer Science or Cybersecurity (3-4 years).
Obtain professional certifications like CEH (Certified Ethical Hacker) or CompTIA Security+.
Join an IT firm or corporate security operations center (SOC).
careers.growth_outlook: High growth, critical corporate priority worldwide

careers.about: A Legal Consultant applies industry best practices, analytical methods, and specialized tools to resolve domain-specific problems. You will collaborate in multidisciplinary teams, drive strategic objectives, and continuously update your skill set to adapt to market trends.
educational_roadmap: Class 12 in any stream.
Clear the Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) or state law CETs.
Complete a 5-year integrated law degree (BA LLB, BBA LLB, B.Com LLB), or a 3-year LLB after graduation.
Intern under senior advocates, law firms, corporate legal rooms, or judicial offices (minimum 12-20 weeks).
Pass the All India Bar Examination (AIBE) to obtain a Certificate of Practice.
Enroll with the State Bar Council and join litigation chambers or corporate offices as Legal Consultant.

colleges.short_description: Premier national institute for training and advanced research in Legal Consultant.

colleges.short_description: Highly respected institute offering vocational and undergraduate courses.

colleges.name: Global School of Legal Consultant (Example Abroad)
colleges.short_description: Renowned worldwide for offering cutting-edge courses and industry placements.

exams.title: JEE Main
exams.purpose: Engineering (B.E./B.Tech) admissions in premier government institutes like NITs, IIITs, and CFTIs, and qualifying for JEE Advanced.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as core subjects.

exams.title: NEET UG (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test)
exams.purpose: Admissions to undergraduate medical (MBBS, BDS, AYUSH) and veterinary courses across India.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Biotechnology.

exams.title: CLAT (Common Law Admission Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to 5-year integrated undergraduate law programs (BA-LLB, BBA-LLB) at 24 National Law Universities (NLUs) in India.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass (minimum 45% marks; 40% for SC/ST). No age limit.

exams.title: UCEED (Undergraduate Common Entrance Examination for Design)
exams.purpose: Admission to Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programs at IIT Bombay, IIT Delhi, IIT Guwahati, IIT Hyderabad, and IIITDM Jabalpur.
exams.eligibility: Open to all streams (Science, Commerce, Humanities). Must have passed Class 12.

exams.title: NID DAT (Design Aptitude Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to undergraduate B.Des courses at National Institute of Design (NID) campuses across India.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream (Science, Commerce, Humanities). Age limit applies (usually under 20).

exams.title: NCHMCT JEE
exams.purpose: Admission to B.Sc. Hospitality and Hotel Administration programs across central and state IHMs (Institutes of Hotel Management).
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream, with English as a compulsory subject.

exams.title: ACET (Actuarial Common Entrance Test)
exams.purpose: Entry exam to gain membership to the Institute of Actuaries of India (IAI) to begin taking actuarial professional papers.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with English and Mathematics as major subjects.
exams.timeline: Conducted in March and June 2026 (Over) / Next: December 2026 (Upcoming)

exams.title: IPMAT (Integrated Program in Management Aptitude Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to the prestigious 5-year Integrated Program in Management (BBA+MBA) at IIM Indore, IIM Rohtak, and other partner institutes.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream (minimum 60% aggregate; 55% for SC/ST).

exams.title: CUET UG (Common University Entrance Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to undergraduate programs in all Central Universities (like Delhi University, JNU, BHU) and participating state/private colleges.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass. Subject combinations depend on the chosen university course requirements.

exams.title: SAT (Scholastic Assessment Test)
exams.purpose: Standardized test for undergraduate admissions to colleges in the USA, Canada, UK, and a growing list of premium Indian private universities.
exams.eligibility: No specific eligibility criteria; open to high school students.
exams.timeline: Conducted multiple times a year: March, May, June 2026 (Over) / Next: August, October, November, December 2026 (Upcoming)

exams.title: IELTS (International English Language Testing System)
exams.purpose: Measures English language proficiency for study, migration, or work abroad in English-speaking nations.
exams.eligibility: Generally recommended for candidates aged 16 and above.
exams.timeline: Conducted multiple times a month throughout the year (Upcoming/Ongoing)

exams.title: NATA (National Aptitude Test in Architecture)
exams.purpose: Admission to 5-year Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) courses in colleges across India.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, or 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics.
exams.timeline: Conducted in weekly phases from April to July 2026 (Ongoing/Over)

exams.title: UPSC Civil Services Examination
exams.purpose: Recruitment to prestigious Indian civil services including IAS, IFS, IPS, and IRS.
exams.eligibility: Graduation degree in any stream. Minimum age of 21 years.

exams.title: ISI Admission Test
exams.purpose: Admission to Bachelor of Statistics (B.Stat Hons) and Bachelor of Mathematics (B.Math Hons) programs at ISI Kolkata and Bengaluru.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Mathematics and English.

exams.title: BITSAT
exams.purpose: Admission to integrated first-degree programs (B.E., B.Pharm, M.Sc.) at BITS Pilani, Goa, and Hyderabad campuses.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology, and English with minimum 75% marks in PCM/B.

exams.title: IIST Admission
exams.purpose: Admission to B.Tech (Aerospace and Avionics) programs at Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology (IIST).
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, plus qualifying in JEE Advanced.

exams.title: ICAR AIEEA
exams.purpose: Admission to Bachelor degree programs in Agriculture and Allied Sciences at State Agricultural Universities.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics/Agriculture.

exams.title: CUET PG
exams.purpose: Admission to Postgraduate programs (including Clinical Psychology) in Central and participating Universities.
exams.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in the relevant subject/discipline.

exams.title: CAT (Common Admission Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to MBA/PGP programs at Indian Institutes of Management (IIMs) and top business schools.
exams.eligibility: Bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwD).

exams.title: AILET (All India Law Entrance Test)
exams.purpose: Admission to BA LLB (Hons) and LLM programs at NLU Delhi.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass (minimum 45% marks) or appearing.

exams.title: LSAT India
exams.purpose: Admission to integrated law programs at participating Indian private universities.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream.

exams.title: LSAT (Law School Admission Test - International)
exams.purpose: Admission to law schools in USA, Canada, and select other countries.
exams.eligibility: Bachelor's degree or high school graduate (varies by program).

exams.title: NIFT Entrance Exam
exams.purpose: Admission to design (B.Des, B.FTech) and management programs at National Institute of Fashion Technology.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream (for B.Des) or with PCM (for B.FTech).

exams.title: NDA (National Defence Academy) Entrance Exam
exams.purpose: Admission to the Army, Navy, and Air Force wings of the NDA and Indian Naval Academy Course.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass in any stream (for Army) or with Physics and Mathematics (for Navy and Air Force). Unmarried male/female candidates.
exams.timeline: Conducted twice a year (NDA I in April, NDA II in September).

exams.title: IGRUA Commercial Pilot License (CPL) Entrance Exam
exams.purpose: Admission to the Ab-initio Commercial Pilot License (CPL) training course at IGRUA.
exams.eligibility: Class 12 pass with English, Physics, and Mathematics (minimum 50-55% aggregate). Minimum age 17.
